title: Filings: How Amazon’s $50B OpenAI deal actually works, and what they’re keeping secret
summary: Amazon's $50 billion OpenAI investment made big headlines, but the SEC filings tell a more complicated story. Here's how the money flows, what triggers the payments, and what the companies are keeping secret. Read More
author: Todd Bishop

title: Rick Beato: Greatest Guitarists of All Time, History & Future of Music | Lex Fridman Podcast #492
summary: Rick Beato is a music educator, interviewer, producer, songwriter, and a true multi-instrument musician, playing guitar, bass, cello & piano. His incredible YouTube channel celebrates great musicians & musical ideas, and helps millions of people fall in love with great music all over again.
